subcodes.first_line: The Command hath come from the unseen realm of divine Identity, from the right side of My heart, bidding: O Ancient Beauty, mention Thy servant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد جاء الامر عن غیب الهویه جهه الایمن من قلبی بان اذکر یا جمال القدم عبدک
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @twin Manifestations, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
